creator: eksffa@freebsdbrasil.com.br
text:
Please go on. Thank you for the pr.

Enviado via iPad

Em 13/06/2011, =C3=A0s 22:34, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> escreveu:

> Maintainer of security/suricata,
>=20
> Please note that PR ports/157860 has just been submitted.
>=20
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>=20
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/157860
>=20
> --=20
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
